steps.title: Identify 'namely' as the elaboration marker
steps.content: The blank comes between the noun phrase “the allegorical intent of Munch's 19th-century painting” and the infinitive phrase “to embody the existential anxiety,” which elaborates on what the intent is. The word “namely” signals this elaboration.

steps.title: Apply the punctuation rule for 'namely'
steps.content:
A dash before “namely” and a comma after (—namely,) introduce an elaboration or restatement.

This creates a clear boundary between the main phrase and the clarifying detail.

The other choices violate this pattern by using different punctuation arrangements.

That confirms C is correct.
